title: merremia umbellata subsp. macra
intro: Merremia umbellata subsp. macra, a subspecies of the Merremia umbellata plant, is a type of flowering vine native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Merremia umbellata subsp. macra include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
